summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29 morning: Mostly cloudy, 8°C, low wind)
summary.market: KOSPI faces high volatility due to Middle East conflicts and global energy shifts. Despite March turmoil, some analysts (Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley) maintain bullish year-end targets (6,500-7,500) driven by AI/chip growth.
summary.art: Global market shows cautious 2026 optimism with 4% growth in 2025; recovery led by high-end rarity and institutionally validated works.
